c2s.name: ClientHello
c2s.description: Initial client metadata and advertised capabilities.

c2s.name: BindingAssigned
c2s.description: Client acknowledgement that a server binding has been mapped locally.

c2s.name: InputValue
c2s.description: Current input value for a declared binding identifier.

c2s.name: SurfaceList
c2s.description: List of currently available client surfaces (id, name, width, height).

c2s.name: SurfaceResized
c2s.description: Notification that a client surface changed size.

s2c.name: AssetManifest
s2c.description: Initial visual asset metadata for the current game session.

s2c.name: SetGameName
s2c.description: Display name of the game/session for client UI.

s2c.name: SetTransformPrediction
s2c.description: Enable/disable transform prediction and configure affected components and mode.

s2c.name: BindingDeclare
s2c.description: Server-declared input binding definition that the client must map.

s2c.name: ElementMoved
s2c.description: Authoritative transform update for a uniquely identified element.

s2c.name: ElementRemoved
s2c.description: Notification that a uniquely identified element should be removed.
